problem id: 9d3e7f1a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10111100 -> 11100010
  00100001 -> 00001000
  00101111 -> 01111000
  11111001 -> 11001011
  00111101 -> 11101000
  11101001 -> 01001011
  10010111 -> 10111010
  10001110 -> 01110010
  01101100 -> 01100001

query: 10101101
predicted answer: 01101010
